title: Restore short-window release truth in the post-hold re-entry contract
summary: Patched the post-hold contract writer to inherit the live short-window release time when the latest repair lane omits it, then regenerated the contract so the next rerun sees 2026-05-26T08:57:00 instead of unknown.
evidence: distribution_lane_latest.json currently omits short_review_window_release_at during distribution_architecture_repair.
marketing_execution_board_latest.md already records short-window congestion clears at 2026-05-26T08:57:00.
